commit.subject: LU-19252 hsm: control rename on archived files/directories
commit.message:
LU-19252 hsm: control rename on archived files/directories

Add parameter mdt.*.enable_archive_rename to control rename on
archived files/directories, enabled by default.
Also, sanity_hsm.sh/test_608 is added to verify this patch.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-hsm
Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I119b0241398f71ed1f9475145b6a398ac6c0cbb6
